entry.title: Re: SAP Business One 10 SP 4211, SLD installation/upgrade...
entry.content:
Hi vinayhatwal

It seems that b1CA.cer is missing in the trusted root certification authorities. Please refer to SAP KBA 3537539 - SAP Business One requires a valid SSL certificate, Step 4 

4. Keep the b1CA.key and b1server.key files safely stored and private.

        Distribute b1CA.cer to all servers, computers and mobile devices across your environment.

        In Windows environment, install the certificate to "Trusted Root Certification Authorities\Certificates".

Kind Regards
Nidhi Singh
SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: Is it necessary to separate B1i application and datab...
entry.content:
Hi ssab_wenx

For optimal performance, please install Integration framework on seperate server.

Also check SAP note   2130388  for the "XCE208 resource is busy" error.

Kind Regards
Nidhi Singh

entry.title: Re: 2LIS_02_SGR initialization issue
entry.content: Hi Kiran: We have same issue, 2LIS_02_SGR is activated (green) in LBWE, but is red in RSA6 and I'm be able to activate it. Did you solved it?

entry.title: Re: SAP Java Buildpack 2: Jakarta-Based, Fresh and New!
entry.content:
Hi @kristiyan,

GA of TomEE 10.0.0 was officially announced by Apache on December 20. See also: Apache TomEE

So - yes, we have it in our plans with high priority. It will be available in SAP Java Buildpack 2 sometime in February.

Best regards, Gergana

entry.title: Re: Object reference not set to instance of an object err...
entry.content:
Hi abdul_wahab4647 

Have a look on SAP note 2268956.

Kind Regards
Nidhi

entry.content: 2025-01-15 16:18:28.652199 [FUTURE FATAL] sap.ui.core.Fragment: An Error occured during XML processing of 'workflow.workflow.view.fragment.EditPaths' with id '__fragment0' - ModuleError: Failed to resolve dependencies of 'sap/m/TimePicker.js' -> 'sap/m/DateTimeField.js' -> 'sap/ui/unified/calendar/CalendarUtils.js': Failed to execute 'sap/ui/unified/calendar/CalendarUtils.js': Refused to evaluate a string as JavaScript because 'unsafe-eval' is not an allowed source of script in the following Content Security Policy directive: "script-src * data: blob:". ModuleError: Failed to resolve dependencies of 'sap/m/TimePicker.js' -> 'sap/m/DateTimeField.js' -> 'sap/ui/unified/calendar/CalendarUtils.js': Failed to execute 'sap/ui/unified/calendar/CalendarUtils.js': Refused to evaluate a string as JavaScript because 'unsafe-eval' is not an allowed source of script in the following Content Security Policy directive: by: ModuleError: Failed to execute 'sap/ui/unified/calendar/CalendarUtils.js': Refused to evaluate a string as JavaScript because 'unsafe-eval' is not an allowed source of script in the following entry.title: Automation Pilot URL '****' is malformed
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

 

after using the example Command from "automation-pilot-examples/mass-stop-start-hana-cloud at main · SAP-samples/automation-pilot-examples · GitHub" I get an error saying the URL is malformed. There is no further information and the Step Logs dont show anything.

All i have to input is the HanaServiceKey and the CF user to authenticate. So i wonder what I am doing wrong.

 

Greetings
Rouven

entry.title: Re: Unable to Retrieve Roles and Groups from IAS in UI5/C...
entry.content: Thanks, but how can i use this API in my UI5 application to fetch the logged in user details.The IAS is configured in BTP and the user logs in to the UI5/CAP application through IAS which is a custom IDP.Once the user is authenticated i want to read the user information,roles and groups assigned to the logged in user directly from my UI5/CAP application.

entry.title: Re: SAP Data Sphere to SAP HANA Cloud Certificate Validat...
entry.content:
First, you need to download SSL cert either from here 

https://dl.cacerts.digicert.com/DigiCertGlobalRootCA.crt.pem

or directly from your HANA cloud instance - Cockpit - Certificate Store. 

Then you go to your Datasphere tenant - System - Configuration - Security and Add this cert. Connection should be now valid with all the features.

entry.title: Sneak Peek in to SAP Analytics Cloud release for Q1 2025
entry.content:
Happy New Year All and we have a very exciting start to Q1 2025. We have so many great features coming this quarter it was hard to settle on a Top 5 but we have and in this blog we give you a sneak peek in to our Top 5 features in SAP Analytics Cloud for QRC1 2025. A full list of what is coming can be found on our Roadmap Explorer.

'Seamless planning' integration with SAP Datasphere

A much anticipated item for this quarter is the introduction of Seamless planning, a new approach to the planning integration between SAP Analytics Cloud and SAP Datasphere. With seamless planning, you can store the SAP Analytics Cloud model’s data (fact and master data) directly in SAP Datasphere, reducing the data footprint and making it available for real-time consumption, additional processing and extensibility scenarios using SAP Datasphere’s capabilities.

Main benefits include:

  • Real-time steering on semantically enriched data.
    Enhanced flexibility to perform live reporting across SAP Analytics Cloud and other data sources based on joint SAP Datasphere analytic models.
  • Extensibility of SAP Analytics Cloud planning using SAP Datasphere capabilities such as data operations using SQL editor.

Learn more in this great blog by @Max_Gander 

Compass – probability simulation

We are very excited to announce the arrival of SAP Analytics Cloud compass, which provides Monte Carlo simulation capabilities with a business user-friendly interface. This enables non-technical users to perform real-time multi-variate analysis without prior IT setup or advanced statistical skills.

With compass, we have broken down the barrier between this mathematical technique and business users by stripping away the complexity and providing an end-user centric interface for configuration and risk analysis. Now non-technical user can also enjoy the benefits of stochastic simulation without prior advanced maths knowledge or IT setup.

Find all the details of how compass works in this comprehensive blog by @ChenNee 

Video data story to present business insights using short videos

Another very exciting feature this quarter is the addition of the "Video Data Story". This feature will allow business users to design and create a short-form video directly inside SAP Analytics Cloud without any video editing expertise. It provides an alternative way to present the business insights using a brand-new format which could be more attractive and intuitive compared with the static content in story.

For step by step instructions on how to create one of these story check out this blog by @roy_jin 

Just ask enhancements

Just ask has been a popular feature in SAP Analytics Cloud and in this release we add several new features including:

  • Just Ask Support for Currency Conversion in Acquired Data Models
  • Just Ask now displays a limited number of data points in the bar charts. Unless you specify a rank or sort, the number of bars shown in a bar chart is limited to 10 bars.
  • Leveraging the SAP HANA Cloud vector engine for word embeddings and perform similarity queries

Job Monitor – Multi Action support

With the addition of Job Monitor, it will be much easier for business users and admin users to gain insights about the status of background jobs and overall processes.

You can now monitor the jobs created while transporting the content. All jobs related to transport operations (such as Export, Import, Download, and Upload) are listed in the Monitor page. You can quickly review the import summary from the Status column.

Learn more in this blog by @SarauShen 

There are plenty more exciting deliverables coming your way this quarter and we will be taking a deeper dive into these items in our What’s New video and blog series so stay tuned. For a full list of all features coming in QRC1 2025 for SAP Analytics Cloud check out the Roadmap Explorer and the What's New Viewer

Want to experience new and existing features for yourself? Take the leap and start your journey towards making data-driven decisions with confidence by signing up for a free trial, today.

#sap #sapanalytics

entry.title: SAP Mobile Services Client Keeps Crashing
entry.content: we are  facing an issue with the SAP Mobile Services Client application. The app is crashing frequently, and we receive the error message: "Mobile Svcs keeps stopping".

entry.title: Re: Obsolete BW 0FISPCER time data - How to kill that rig...
entry.content:
Rebuild the data with RSRHIERARCHYVIRT, wont help:

 

Reinstall the 0FSICVPER from the RSA1 / Business Content wont help.

We opened a Ticket

entry.title: AC06 Service Master - "Changed On Date" incorrect to Created Date
entry.content:
We are getting many instances of the changed on date being years before the created date when listing service masters using AC06.

There are no functional specs that could be causing this, anyone any ideas?

entry.title: How to Implement "Navigate to List on Save" in a Fiori Elements App with OData V4
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm developing an application using the SAP CAP framework as the backend and Fiori Elements as the frontend. My app is structured as a List Report with an Object Page.

For OData V2, I know there's an easy way to achieve a "navigate to list on save" behavior by setting the attribute `"navToListOnSave": true` in the `manifest.json` of the Object Page, as described in the SAPUI5 documentation

I need to replicate this behavior in OData V4: when the user presses the "Save" button on the Object Page, the app should automatically navigate back to the List Report.

Does anyone have recommendations for implementing a robust, fast, and elegant solution for this requirement in OData V4? Ideally, I'd prefer to keep modifications minimal and aligned with Fiori Elements' declarative approach.

Any guidance, code snippets, or resources would be greatly appreciated!

Thanks in advance!

UI5 Version: 1.130.0

entry.title: Re: Welcome to the SAP Enterprise Architecture Community Group!
entry.content: Do you belong to a SAP User group?  There are enterprise architecture groups in those.

entry.title: Need help on User exit in CJ20N at componant level
entry.content:
I want a validation of Quantity of Componant assigned in PS should not exceed the Quantity of same material code mentioned in Sales Order Item Catagory.

 

We have created a User defiened field in PS - PRPS Field USR00, where Sales order will be mentioned and we want to put a validation that if Sales order number is XYZ and Material Number is ABC then vaidate the same material is in VBAP- MATNR and Quantity is equal. 

 

 

 

We need a User exit in PS Componant Level in CJ20N to create this validation.

 

Request you to kindly help on this

entry.title: Re: SAP Mobile Services Client Keeps Crashing
entry.content: @Riyaz_abdul Could you share the MDK client version? You can find the details in the device Settings

entry.title: CJ9FS Cost Planning version from V0 to V1 should check if Data is already there and throw error
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am having one requirement, If I am saving a Cost Planning version from Version 0 to Version 1 then it should check if there is already data saved, if data is saved it should throw error or warning messge that "Data already exixts".

I am looking for userexit for CJ9FS and logic to write this program. 

Thanks in Advance.

entry.title: Re: Able to get list all components while booking Non con...
entry.content: Hi! If my answer was helpful, please consider accepting it as solution.

entry.title: Re: How to verify, Second Mail is Add with SAP Universal...
entry.content: You can also check the "Not linked" tab, is the Yahoo email address visible there?

entry.title: Re: Dependency Formula for BOM qty
entry.content: You could check on the configuration screen under "Bill-of-Material" if your dependency works during the order configuration.

entry.title: Re: Can I change associated email address for user id?
entry.content:
Hi @hyunae,

I suggest you start by contacting sso@sap.com to update the email address of your P-user ID. (to your gmail address)

Once the P-user ID has been updated correctly, you can change the Universal ID primary email in the account settings https://account.sap.com/ -> Personal Info -> Universal ID E-mail.

entry.title: SAPUI5 auto refresh binding
entry.content:
Is there any possible way  to check if value  is changing other than using interval?

 

 
            this._intervalId = setInterval(function () {

            var sPath1= `/SalesOrderManage('${sSalesOrderID1}')/SalesOrderType`;
 
             }, 2500); // 5000 milliseconds = 5 seconds
           
        },
code is just small preview but i get data like this  oModel.bindContext(sPath1).requestObject() and i have to refresh the value of data, but i wanna know is there any possible way to get it without interval?

entry.title: Incorrect escape parameter for tag : DescriptionOfNatureOfEntitysOperationsAndPrincipalActivities
entry.content:
Hi experts,

Incorrect escape parameter for tag DescriptionOfNatureOfEntitysOperationsAndPrincipalActivities in XHTML report / SAP DM ST2200

After generating the XBRL package, I observed that in one tag of type StringItemtype - i.e. DescriptionOfNatureOfEntitysOperationsAndPrincipalActivities the escape parameter =“true”. The correct parameter for this type of tag is escape ="false".

I think this is a bug. Has anyone already diagnosed this bug and knows how to eliminate it?

Kind regards

Iwona

entry.title: Re: problems with MKD client
entry.content: @Bill_froelich thanks for trying to help me, but that solution didn't work. i still have the same problem. I am doing all this to debug my MDK application, is there any other easier way to do it without installing a MDK client?

entry.title: Re: SAP Universal ID S users - issue
entry.content:
Hi @alessia_pozzi,

Please contact our Customer Interaction Center.

Usually when access to an S-user ID is lost, all connected content and linked accounts are also lost, but perhaps they can help you recover access.

entry.title: Re: SAP Mobile Services Client Keeps Crashing
entry.content: @Jitendra_Kansal,Thank you for your response. The version of the SAP Mobile Services Client installed on the device is 24.11.1.

entry.title: DataAction (Calculation in data action for inflation and price in different versions and dates)
entry.content: Hello team, I am working on a project where I have price and inflation. Inflation(Inflação) is in forecast, and price(preço) is in planning. What I want to do is create a data action that retrieves the price from the source year (2024) and source version (actual) and multiplies it by the inflation of the target year (2025). I have already created the data action, but it is not working. Could you help me resolve this issue?

entry.title: Re: Is There a Script Example for Exception Handling in O...
entry.content: Thanks for the reply. It realy helped. I just had to change a few things.

entry.title: Re: Is There a Script Example for Exception Handling in O...
entry.content: ... continuing... the line "def odataException = ex.getCause().getCause();" I changed to "def odataException = ex.getCause();". The error list I get using this code " odataException.getCause().getODataError().getDetails().each { detail -> // Adiciona a mensagem de erro à lista message.setProperty("ODataError.Detail", detail.getMessage()) }"

entry.title: Re: SAP Mobile Services Client Keeps Crashing
entry.content:
@Riyaz_abdul Thanks for sharing the version details. 

Did you freshly install the MDK client version 24.11.1 from the Play Store and then observe this behavior? Or did you already have a previous version (lower than 24.11.1), and after upgrading to 24.11.1, you started seeing the problem?

entry.title: Clear open items in the Public Cloud from the Private Cloud with the help technical clearing or
entry.content:
Hello All,

We have a business requirement to clear open items in the Public Cloud from the Private Cloud. When an open item is cleared in the Private Cloud, the system should immediately clear the corresponding open item in the Public Cloud, using a Technical Clearing GL Account as a reference. Could you please let us know how this business requirement can be achieved?" How can development this business requirement ?  

Thank you 

JP

entry.title: Re: SAP Mobile Start fails to load App
entry.content:
Dear Thomas,

 Thank you very much for your response, I will open a customer ticket.

Kind regards,
Diego

entry.title: Re: SAP Mobile Services Client Keeps Crashing
entry.content: @Jitendra_Kansal,On the device experiencing the issue, we freshly installed the 24.11.1 version from the Play Store, and the app is crashing. However, on another device where the previous version of the app is installed, the app is not crashing. Please let us know if you need more details to investigate further.

entry.title: Re: How to verify, Second Mail is Add with SAP Universal...

entry.title: Re: Query using the service of Northwind of ODATA
entry.content:
Hi,

I assume that you are using HTTP adapter. If you use Odata Adapter you will get what you want 🙂

Regards,

Emre.

entry.title: Re: Physical Inventory
entry.content:
Hello
Do you know if we can set a substitute for the users configured in OMJ2?

I try to use the transaction RMPS_SET_SUBSTITUTE but with no sucess...

Best regards, 

Bruno

entry.title: Inconsistency between Certification information
entry.content:
I woul like to get the certification for: 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition, manufacturing

The issue is that the infomartion about the topics of the exams are:

  • Managing clean core
  • introduction to SAP S/4HANA Supply Chain Planning
  • Introduction to SAP S/4HANA Production Planning
  • Demand Management in SAP S/4HANA
  • Advanced Planning in SAP S/4HANA
  • Capacity Planning in SAP S/4HANA
  • Lean Manufacturing in SAP S/4HANA
  • Master Data in SAP S/4HANA
  • Production Orders in SAP S/4HANA
  • Material Requirements Planning in SAP S/4HANA
  • Process Orders in SAP S/4HANA

But the learning journey does not match with the topics.

  • Exploring Business Processes in SAP S/4HANA Discrete Shopfloor Control
  • Exploring Business Processes in SAP S/4HANA Process Shopfloor Control
  • Exploring Basic Data for Manufacturing and Product Management in SAP S/4HANA
  • Managing Production Orders in SAP S/4HANA Manufacturing
  • Exploring Capacity Planning in SAP S/4HANA
  • Managing Clean Core for SAP S/4HANA Cloud

Can someone hepl me ?? Thanks

entry.title: Repack Products into Handling Units or Storage Bins in EWM-Managed Storage Location
entry.content:
Hello!
I have some troubles while using the Handling Unit API. I try to Repack Products as described ( https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/e1841426f60f4e50913ec9a64aba8332/2e4fa69034674856a3a201c0c14bdd65.html?locale=en-US&version=2022.002 ). When executing the action, I always get the error message “ISO Code and Language Code &PC& do not match”. PC is the HandlingUnitQuantityUnit parameter, which I am using to call the function. Using different parameters leads to the same error.
Does anyone have an idea what exactly is the problem and how to solve it?
Thanks for your help.

entry.title: Need help setting up my email configuration with GoogleWorkspace
entry.content: Hi - I just installed Crystal Server 2020 and need help setting up my email configuration. We use GoogleWorkspace for email and I am having difficulty configuring my email destination on the adaptivejobserver. Does anyone else use googleworkspace for email and have configured your email to work properly? Thanks - Jay

entry.title: I want to extend Odata service using Simple field extension technique. Unable to do it.
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I want to extend the Fiori app "FIN_GLAUDITJRNL" with 2 new fields from standard table.
The entity is mapped from CDS view. I have added fields to the CDS view by extending it and also to the DDIC structure of entity type.
I have redefined "define" method in MPC_EXT class as well and added below code.

  model->get_entity_type( 'Journal' )->ADD_AUTO_EXPAND_INCLUDE(
  EXPORTING
    IV_INCLUDE_NAME = 'INCL_EEW_ACDOC'
    IV_BIND_CONVERSIONS = 'X'

I am able to see, the 2 new fields when I do a "model->get_entity_type( 'Journal' )->get_properties( )", but I am not able to see when I download the metadata of the service.
Can you please help, if I have to do something more?
Please note, it is not possible to achieve this using Custom Fields and Logic App.

entry.title: Re: SAP Mobile Services Client Keeps Crashing
entry.content:
@Riyaz_abdul I just tried it on my Android device and didn't experience any crashes.

I did a fresh download of the MDK client from Google Play and was able to see the agreement screen. Is this the process you followed?

Could you look into the Client Logs if you see any relevant info?  Refer this document.

entry.title: Document store in Employee profile
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

The documents which we generated in the employee central, is it possible to store the documents in employee profile? Could you please help me in this scenario.

 

Best regards,

Gunti Sreenivasulu.

entry.title: Re: Hana datavolume reclaim space
entry.content: Hi Got thise error

entry.title: Re: RISE sooner than later - Part 2
entry.content: Hi @Jimjees, that's a great blog! Can you elaborate on how your approach would extend back into the organisation's strategy, e.g., the Strategy Map in the SAP EAF Metro Map? That way it's not just solution-oriented and avoiding the trap that TOGAF identifies, e.g. 11   Jumping to Phase G. Thanks, Simon

entry.title: Re: Auditing Solution Update for SAP BusinessObjects BI Platform 4.3 +
entry.content:
Hi @Matthew_Shaw 

 

Love this universe and reports. I am looking for some audit report that can help track Web Intelligence/Crystal/Lumira dashboards that are associated with a specific universe and list all data providers used by Webi/Crystal/Lumira dashboards?

entry.title: SAC PPDS Business Content
entry.content:
Hey community,

does some implemented the SNote 3483259 & 350482 on an S/4 HANA Release 2023 FPS0 or FPS1?

I have issues with assigning the objects to the right package. The Objects from the Snotes are not possible to assin to SAP Standard Package /SAPAPO/PPDS_DDIC, $temp or a Z Package. 

Anyone can give me some advise?

KR

entry.title: Re: Hana datavolume reclaim space
entry.content: SAP DBTech JDBC: [2]: general error : Could not find any NameServer or Index Server at location hanadb:30003 Our host is hanadb and instance 00

entry.title: Do you want to learn how to utilize SAP CX AI Toolkit with SAP Commerce Cloud?
entry.content:
I  recommend to access our Utilizing SAP CX AI Toolkit for SAP Commerce Cloud learning journey.

Overview
This learning journey provides a comprehensive overview of SAP CX AI Toolkit for SAP Commerce Cloud persona. It seeks to empower learners to deploy intelligent automation with the SAP CX AI Toolkit and create an engaging smart shopping experience for customers.

Learning objectives
Upon completing the learning journey, learners will be able to:

  • Describe the role of the SAP CX AI Toolkit within the SAP CX portfolio, its key features, and the associated business benefits in SAP Commerce Cloud.
  • Perform the essential steps to access the SAP CX AI Toolkit and establish a connection to SAP Commerce Cloud.
  • Utilize the essential features of SAP CX AI Toolkit within SAP Commerce Cloud for their business use cases.

Pass all the quizzes and receive a digital badge

Please ask a question related to the digital learning Journey in the Q&A area. 
Our SAP Learning Experts will get back to you as soon as possible! We are here to support you. 

I appreciate your feedback and we will make sure to continue sharing interesting topics.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Possible to add a new supplier whose master data doesnot exist in S4?
entry.content: Is it possible to add a supplier in RFQ which doesn't exist in S4/HANA. What about one time supplier?

entry.title: Re: Hana datavolume reclaim space
entry.content: Its SAP Business One HANA Platform

entry.title: Re: SAP and Arm64 version of Windows 11 with Prism emulat...
entry.content: @Stephan ADT is not natively supporting Windows on ARM. I used x64 versions of JRE & Eclipse. By the way, did you use Microsoft JRE on Arm64?

entry.title: Re: SAP SSAM2210 app update failed issue
entry.content: @rupeshpandit1999 Apply SAP Note # 3402397 - SAP Service and Asset Manager - App update failed, extension-MapFramework doesn't exist in shared scope default

entry.title: Re: Acquiring Core ABAP Skills - /LRN/... courses
entry.content:
You may raise an issue by clicking on "create a case" at https://learning.sap.com/helpcenter, select Technical Queries then fill in the following form.

Email/User ID for login:
What SAP Platform (URLs)?
Course name:
Code unit name:
Page number:
Detail steps with screenshots (Screenshots of any error message will assist in quicker resolution times):

entry.title: Re: Data truncation with export to pdf
entry.content:
Firstly, don't mix SP's. Update your DEV PC with SP 37 so it matches what you installed on the Server. Rebuild your project and redeploy the app to the server.

See my blog on updating your Project:

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/upgrading-a-visual-studio-2008-gt-2022-net-project-with-the-latest-cr-net/ba-p/13469215

Second, Font truncation has nothing to do with the font itself (Mostly). It's handled by registry keys CR uses to deal with fonts. Note: CR uses default values within it's code, to alter those default values CR uses the registry keys.

Did you export and copy the DEV PC's CR's Export Registry keys to the Server as I suggested in your other post?

For more info on export registry keys have a look at this KBA:

https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/2165260

Also, please don't generate multiple post for the same issue. It's a pain having to refer back to what was suggested and results...

entry.content:
Hello,

Any way to differentiate the changes made manually & changes incorporated using V management

entry.title: Hierarchical strategy plan maintenance packet call pause in multiple packet case
entry.content:
Hello,

If I have strategy based preventive maintenance plan which includes one maintenance item and which task list include multiple different selected maintenance packets (cycle/interval).

QUESTION: Can I pause and put on hold OIL CHANGE 3 WEE,  but still continue VISUAL INSPECTION 1 WEE packet to call order every  1 week?

1. VISUAL INSPECTION  1 WEE 

2. OIL CHANGE 3 WEE

entry.title: Re: Is there a limit on number of rules that can be used...
entry.content:
Hi @AS60 , there is no limitation regarding how many rules are allowed. Many rules might impacting the performance, but it completely depends on the rules. Try to avoid a lot of DB accesses by using variables as often as possible, reduce navigations if possible and configure the rules the way the most likely true condition in the if-statement will be configured right at the beginning. 

Hope that helps...

BR, Sylvia

entry.title: SAP BRIM Prepayment functionality for Solution quotation before contract activation
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Looking out for pointer if any one has worked on how to handle prepayments for subscription contracts even before they are activated. We want to use solution quotation and raise invoice and accept payments.

entry.title: Re: Is there a limit on number of rules that can be used...
entry.content: Thank you very much Silvia, this is very helpful.

entry.title: Re: How to update Calculated Measure based on Page or Inp...
entry.content:
hi Nikhil,

I found this topic, maybe you can help us. 

We faced the issue with Calculated Measure Description, in which we use Input Control base on Current Date Variable.

Such we don't take System Current Date, but  Current Date Variable - > in the result we have for example values for 01.2025, but  Description is not updated and we see it like for 12.2024 (when we created this Input Control).

So measure is calculated correctly with the correct filter. but Description not.

And to see correct Description users need to refresh page after opening.

Is it bug? Do you know how we can fix it?

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: How Extend and keep the validation the standard fiori...
entry.content: Most apps don't support metadata extensions. However, this can be achieved through local annotations, as they are already using an adaptation project.

entry.title: Error R1212 during synchronization from employee to BP
entry.content:
During the synchronization from employee to BP, it is possible for us to influence the generated BP number.

Firstly, how BP grouping is determined during synchronization?

BP grouping is determined as per system table T77S0
GRPID: HRALX
SEMID: PNUMB
If you set it to '1', the system uses the internal interval (In transaction BUC2, there is an interval where selected as standard grouping for internal number assignment) of number range object BU_PARTNER.
If you set it to '2', the system uses a specific internal interval for the object. In this case you will have to maintain the interval ID in parameter HRALX PSUBG.
If you set it to '3', the number is transferred from HR and a prefix is added. For this, an external interval should be created in number range BU_PARTNER (from XX00000000 to XX99999999, where XX stands for any two letters). So in this case, the interval ID should be maintained in HRALX PSUBG.

If it is 3, then PSUBG = number range of BP = BP grouping If not, error R1 212 happens.
The number ranges for the Business Partner can be maintained through transaction BUCF or by this path: SPRO –> Cross Application Components –> SAP Business Partner –> Business Partner –> Basic Settings –> Number ranges and Groupings -> Define number ranges:

BP grouping for the Business Partner can be maintained through transaction BUC2 or by this path: SPRO –> Cross Application Components –> SAP Business Partner –> Business Partner –> Basic Settings –> Number ranges and Groupings -> Define Groupings and Assign Number Ranges: 

For example, in T77S0


Then in BUCF, it should be 

In BUC2

For more information, you can check 

2792166 - Same number for BP and employee

3268345 SLG1 error: Grouping && does not exist (message R1 212)

Hope this blog can help you.

 

Best Regards,
Grace

entry.title: Re: How Extend and keep the validation the standard fiori...

entry.title: Re: Food Recovery Program simplified in SAP HCM Payroll
entry.content:
Hi, 

I would say this is a good topic, also in current days it can be think combined with other solutions with like EC. Where it can be combined more functionality with custom programs or whatever is needed. For example it can be created time sheets with time valuation results in EC to go to IT2010 with rules that consider employee data or even a one time payment for this.

Also note this kind of suggestions we have a portal that customers can use to enter ideas and they will reach the pertinent product manager. With this a product manager will evaluate if it is needed more functionality in the standard to cover customer scenarios. You can add it to this customer influence program entering note using https://pages.community.sap.com/topics/influence-adopt 

thanks,

entry.title: Re: Equipment masterdata quick buttons

I think you would be looking for something like this where you can append additional fcodes that they wish to have excluded.

 

Regards,

Ryan Crosby

entry.title: Migration to SAP DS 4.3
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are planning to migrate to SAP DS 4.3 SP03 from SAP DS 4.2 SP10. 

SAP DS 4.3 will be on a new server (Linux). The current SAP DS 4.2 SP10 runs with Oracle 12c DB. We are also planning to upgrade the DB from Oracle 12c to Oracle 19c. Oracle 19c will also be installed on a new server.

We have about 10 repositories in Production and over 1000 jobs. Due to the criticality of the jobs, we plan to do a repository wise migration and testing (so that the whole Production environment is not affected)

Our migration plan is as below :

1. Migrate the Users and dependencies to new 4.3 system (all in one go) using Promotion Management

2. Select 4 repositories from the current Production system and migrate it using Promotion Management. Upgrade the repositories using Repository Manager tool from 4.2 to 4.2 version.

3. Dis-associate the Job Servers from the migrated repositories using Server Manager (at source).

4. Use Server Manager (at destination system- 4.3 ) and define Job Servers for Repositories)

Question :

Now as we can see, there will be some repositories (jobs) which will stay in the 4.2 System with the 12c version and some repositories which will be migrated to the 4.3 system and run with underlying 19c DB.

Will this approach work? We will ensure that the same jobs would not run in both the systems (so that there is no data redundancy). 

Additionally, will the above approach work if we do an in-place upgrade of Oracle 12c to Oracle 19c (DB Server will remain the same)?

Please help !!

 

 

(The other 6 repositories will continue to run

entry.title: Re: Optimization on SELECT Statement using SORTED INTERNAL Table
entry.content: Hi Sandra...thanks for reply...This select is written independent and not inside the loop.

entry.title: Re: Public Cloud - Consume local service/API in ABAP code
entry.content: Hi Andreas! We thought about that, but the problem is that we may have some issues in future finantial audit. Regarding CL_WEB_ODATA_CLIENT_FACTORY, the problem is that the only services allowed to be used there are custom ones, SAP standard services cannot be used. Regards!

entry.title: APK file from MDK app, signature verification failed
entry.content:
Hello,

I have an MDK application that I am trying to get running on a fleet of Android devices using an APK file. I have created the APK file using Mobile Build in Mobile Services. The build completes successfully with no issues. However when I try to install the file on my devices I get the error: "App not installed as package appears to be invalid".

I tried running the APK file in Android Studio on an emulator and I get the following error message:

There seems to be some issue with the signature but I can't determine what might be causing this. I have created APK files from Mobile Services in the past with no issues.

mobile development kit client SAP Mobile Platform Android SAP BTP SDK for Android 
@bill_froelich

entry.title: SAC - Previous years calculation for account dimension
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

I have a problem in SAP Analytics Cloud SAP Analytics Cloud, data modeling with  previous years calculation for account dimension.

Modeling

I have a fact model with AccountCode and Balance information of P&L, and a Public dimension of type account that contains all the list of accounts included EBT account, on which I need to show in a dashboard the running values of last 2/3 years by month since actual year (as example if year is 2024 and I need to show 2021 / 2022 / 2023 values by month).

Dashboard

In the first attachment I created a dashboard where I show the year 2024, but I cannot find a way to calculate and show the previous years (as horizontal line I should have only the 12 months)

 

 

In the second attachment I show the Running EBT total formula I used in the dashboard

 

 

Question

How can I change or add formulas to obtain my achieve? In this case I want to show 3 lines of different colour each one about Running EBT Total of that year

 

It would be great if someone can help here! 

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: Contract-Based Revenue Recognition
entry.content:
Hi Joana, 

The provider contract can not be created directly. It must be created via Subscription Billing.

Now Contract-Based Revenue Recognition(CBRR) can have standard integration with Subscription Billing. Technically, the subscription billing creates the provider contract, And the provider contract further integrates with CBRR. Therefore you will have a E2E integration from Subscription Billing to CBRR. 

In addition to S/4 HANA Cloud standard integration, CBRR can also integrate with external interface via the API in api.sap.com

Best Regards

Xin

entry.title: Re: Celebrating 2 Years of the Digital Skills Initiative
entry.content: Hello again, unfortunately although I sent an email to digitalskills@sap.com with my completed course, I didn't receive any free voucher or code.

entry.title: Re: Inbound processing in endpoint at /EC_to_ERP_Master_D...
entry.content:
Hi @AbdulHammed ,

The error "IllegalStateException: The request object has been recycled and is no longer associated with this facade" is likely tied to the SOAP sender adapter configuration. Since this is a standard interface and changes to the iFlow are not possible, please follow these steps:

  1. Verify the Message Exchange Pattern is One-Way and Processing Settings are set to WS Standard. If feasible, switch to Robust(Wouldn't be possible as this is a standard interface).
  2. Raise a support ticket with BC-CP-IS-OPS to SAP in order to adjust the tenant configuration, as this may require a parameter update and tenant restart.

Once completed, the issue should be resolved. You may also refer to the SAP Support Knowledge Base Article (KBA) linked below, which addresses the same issue and was recently posted due to many customers on the NEO environment facing similar challenges.

By following the above steps and referencing the SAP Note and KBA, you should be able to resolve the issue effectively.
SAP Reference KBA: https://me.sap.com/notes/3559293/E 

Best regards,
Hammad Sharif

entry.title: Re: Using db2audit with SAP Applications
entry.content: More details documentation on schema auditing activation from SAP application will help here with details step by step doc.

entry.title: Create Sales Order in S4/HANA from SAP IBP
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

 

I have a custom scenario of creating Sales Order in S4 from SAP IBP. I wanted to get some ideas if someone has worked in any of such similar scenarios.

For me these are the 2 approaches , please feel free to add or correct them ..

1. Using a custom function module which would call the standard BAPI's and then via a webservice we can connect in CI-DS , or we can use RFC function call.

Can we do this without the custom function module by using only standard BAPI's like BAPI_SALESORDER_CREATEFROMDAT2 ?

2. Can we handle this scenario also using API's , for that I believe we need to create a REST based datastore in CI-DS. Do someone have any concrete documentation on the same ??

 

Any help is much appreciated !

 

Kind regards,

Sreejit

entry.title: Re: Create Sales Order in S4/HANA from SAP IBP
entry.content: Why would the IBP platform be creating a sales order?

entry.title: Re: Incorrect escape parameter for tag : DescriptionOfNat...
entry.content:
Hi Iwona

Isn't that correct?

https://www.esma.europa.eu/sites/default/files/library/esma32-60-254_esef_reporting_manual.pdf

In line with the XBRL International Working Group Note published on 19 April 202327,
for facts with a datatype of dtr-types:textBlockItemType, Iissuers shall always set the
iXBRL @escaped attribute to “true”

 

Marc
